ko.name: 성장과학 기초
ko.note: 유전·호르몬·성장판·뼈나이 등 성장의 과학적 메커니즘을 궁금해하는 부모 대상. 검색량 규모 대형이나 경쟁도 높음. 긴 포스트 클러스터로 authority 구축.

ko.name: 성조숙증
ko.note: 네이버 proxy 13,540 — Google에서도 최상위 수요. 여아 가슴·남아 조기 변성기 등 세부 long-tail 다수. 클리닉 핵심 진료과목이라 상업적 연결 높음.

ko.name: 키 성장 생활습관
ko.note: 수면·운동·식단·자세 등 부모가 집에서 실천할 수 있는 생활 가이드. 검색량 중·고. 실용 콘텐츠라 체류시간·공유율 높고 내부 링크 허브 역할.

ko.name: 영양·보충제
ko.note: 네이버 proxy 17,260 — 시장 최대 검색량. 구매 의도 혼재. 팩트 중심 포스트(영양소 근거 + 주의사항)로 신뢰도 확보하며 클리닉 상담 CTA 연결.

ko.name: 성장클리닉 상담
ko.note: 클리닉 방문·검사·치료 의향 부모. 성장판 검사, 성장호르몬 주사, 뼈나이 검사 등 transactional 키워드와 연결. 직접 전환 유입 핵심 pillar.

ko.name: 사춘기 발달
ko.note: 초경·고환 발달 등 2차 성징 시기를 걱정하는 부모. 성조숙증 pillar와 인접하지만 '정상 범위 확인' intent 중심. 여아·남아 각각 세분화.

ko.name: 아이 키 평균·예측
ko.note: 초등학생 평균키·나이별 키 성장표·예상키 계산 등 비교·측정 욕구. 검색량 중. 계산기 도구 페이지로 연결해 클리닉 인지도 강화.

en.name: Height Growth Science
en.note: Broadest informational pillar. Covers the science behind height — genetics, hormones, growth plates, puberty stages. US+India both have huge volume (22K+49K). This is the top-of-funnel entry point for worried parents.

en.name: Growth Hormone & Medical Treatment
en.note: HGH-related searches total 60K+ in US, 18K+ in India. Parents researching medical options, HGH injections, side effects. Core E-E-A-T content for Korean specialist credibility. SEO-only for US; ads viable in India.

en.name: Precocious Puberty
en.note: 27K monthly US, 8K India. High medical intent, very low competition. Parents alarmed by early puberty signs searching for causes and treatment. Strong SEO opportunity across all 4 English markets.

en.name: Height Prediction Tools
en.note: Tool-intent pillar. 'height calculator' alone is 110K US monthly — the single largest traffic engine. Low competition (CPC $2.35). Drives return visits, time-on-site, and consultation funnel. Also 33K in India.

en.name: Child Nutrition & Height
en.headKeyword: foods that help children grow taller
en.note: Parents actively searching diet, calcium, vitamins, supplements for child height. High India+Philippines traffic. Actionable how-to content converts well. Bridge between lifestyle and medical pillars.

en.name: Sleep & Lifestyle for Growth
en.headKeyword: sleep and growth hormone in children
en.note: Covers sleep routines, screen time, stress, posture — the environmental 20% of height. Strong parent education angle. Differentiates from supplement brands by providing medical-backed lifestyle guidance.

en.name: Exercise & Physical Activity for Height
en.headKeyword: exercises to grow taller for kids
en.note: Distinct pillar from nutrition. Jump rope, stretching, sports — parents look for age-appropriate exercise that stimulates growth plates. Works across all 4 English markets, especially Philippines.

en.name: Korean Growth Clinic
en.note: Commercial pillar — the clinic's core differentiation. Targets parents already considering medical treatment who search for Korean specialist credentials, real cases, doctor profiles. Trust-building + conversion funnel.

en.name: Parent Concerns & Child Height Worries
en.headKeyword: my child is too short what to do
en.note: Emotional, empathy-driven pillar. Parents worried about short stature, class ranking, self-esteem, late bloomers. High share-ability and emotional search intent. Bridge from concern to consultation.

en.name: Supplements & Height
en.note: 5.4K US, 5.4K India. NuBest Tall competitor gap in India (only 110 branded searches). Medical-credential angle vs supplement brands. Positions clinic as evidence-based alternative to supplements.

th.name: ฮอร์โมนและวิทยาศาสตร์การเจริญเติบโต
th.headKeyword: โกรทฮอร์โมนเด็ก
th.note: โกรทฮอร์โมน 3,600/เดือน — หมวดหลักที่แข็งแกร่งที่สุดในไทย ครอบคลุมเนื้อหาวิทยาศาสตร์การเติบโต ฮอร์โมน แผ่นกระดูก และกลไกการเจริญเติบโต

th.name: ส่วนสูงเด็กและการติดตามการเติบโต
th.headKeyword: ส่วนสูงเด็กไทย
th.note: ส่วนสูงเด็ก 2,400 + ความสูงเด็ก 1,300 — ผู้ปกครองค้นหาข้อมูลค่าเฉลี่ย เปอร์เซ็นไทล์ และการติดตามพัฒนาการลูก

th.name: วิธีเพิ่มความสูงและพัฒนาการ
th.headKeyword: วิธีเพิ่มความสูงเด็ก
th.note: วิธีเพิ่มความสูง 1,300 — ครอบคลุมโภชนาการ การออกกำลังกาย การนอนหลับ และวิธีปฏิบัติตัวในชีวิตประจำวันเพื่อเพิ่มความสูง

th.name: ภาวะเจริญพันธุ์ก่อนวัยและปัญหาการเจริญเติบโต
th.headKeyword: ภาวะเจริญพันธุ์ก่อนวัยในเด็ก
th.note: ปัญหาสุขภาพที่กระทบการเติบโต เช่น ภาวะเจริญพันธุ์ก่อนวัย (precocious puberty) โรคอ้วน ความเครียด และปัจจัยที่ขัดขวางความสูง — กลุ่มผู้ปกครองที่กังวลสูง

th.name: คลินิกส่วนสูงและการรักษาทางการแพทย์
th.headKeyword: คลินิกเพิ่มความสูง
th.note: คลินิกเพิ่มความสูง 260 + ฉีดโกรทฮอร์โมน ~1,000 — B2C conversion keyword หลัก ครอบคลุมการรักษาในคลินิก การฉีดฮอร์โมน และการปรึกษาแพทย์

th.name: โภชนาการและอาหารเพื่อการเจริญเติบโต
th.headKeyword: อาหารเพิ่มความสูงเด็ก
th.note: แคลเซียมเพิ่มความสูง 1,000 + นมเพิ่มความสูง 720 — ผู้ปกครองค้นหาอาหาร วิตามิน แคลเซียม และโภชนาการที่ช่วยให้ลูกสูงขึ้น

th.name: คำถามผู้ปกครองและข้อกังวลเรื่องส่วนสูงลูก
th.headKeyword: ลูกตัวเตี้ยกว่าเพื่อน
th.note: ช่องทาง empathy — ผู้ปกครองที่กังวลเรื่องส่วนสูงลูก ค้นหาคำตอบสำหรับสถานการณ์เฉพาะ เช่น ลูกเตี้ยกว่าเพื่อน ลูกกินเก่งแต่ไม่สูง และคำถามที่พบบ่อย

vi.name: Cách tăng chiều cao cho trẻ
vi.headKeyword: cách tăng chiều cao cho trẻ
vi.note: Pillar rộng nhất — bố mẹ Việt tìm kiếm phương pháp cụ thể giúp con cao thêm. Bao gồm khoa học tăng trưởng, hormone, di truyền, thời điểm vàng.

vi.name: Thực đơn và dinh dưỡng tăng chiều cao
vi.headKeyword: thực đơn tăng chiều cao cho trẻ
vi.note: Xu hướng bùng nổ 11 lần từ Hà Nội — cơ hội dẫn đầu SEO. Bao gồm chế độ ăn, thực phẩm, thói quen ăn sáng, canxi, vitamin D.

vi.name: Giấc ngủ và thói quen sống tăng trưởng
vi.note: Phụ huynh quan tâm lối sống: giấc ngủ sâu, hormone tăng trưởng ban đêm, thói quen buổi sáng, vận động, tư thế. Ít cạnh tranh, chuyên sâu.

vi.name: Dậy thì sớm và sức khỏe xương
vi.headKeyword: dậy thì sớm ở trẻ em
vi.note: Lo lắng phổ biến của bố mẹ Việt — dậy thì sớm đóng sụn tăng trưởng sớm, ảnh hưởng chiều cao tương lai. Bao gồm tuổi đóng sụn, tuổi xương, béo phì.

vi.name: Dự đoán chiều cao và theo dõi tăng trưởng
vi.headKeyword: dự đoán chiều cao của trẻ
vi.note: Phụ huynh muốn biết con sẽ cao bao nhiêu — công cụ dự đoán, bảng tăng trưởng, bách phân vị, so sánh với bạn cùng lớp.

vi.name: Phòng khám tăng trưởng Hàn Quốc
vi.headKeyword: bác sĩ tăng chiều cao Hàn Quốc
vi.note: Keyword chuyển đổi cao nhất — bố mẹ đã tìm kiếm giải pháp y tế chuyên sâu. Định vị phòng khám 187 là y tế Hàn Quốc chính thống, khác biệt với thực phẩm chức năng NuBest.

vi.name: Hormone tăng trưởng và điều trị y tế
vi.headKeyword: hormone tăng trưởng ở trẻ em
vi.note: Nội dung chuyên sâu y tế — hormone tăng trưởng, tuyến giáp, điều trị, tác dụng phụ. Xây dựng E-E-A-T và uy tín chuyên môn cho bác sĩ Chae.
